igbo.sorry_something_went_wrong_try_again: Ndo, ihe adịghị mma. Nwaa ọzọ!
igbo.step_by_step_solution: Ngwọta nzọ ụkwụ nke ọ bụla
igbo.step_by_step_solution_2: 📋 Ngwọta nzọ ụkwụ nke ọ bụla
igbo.click_tiles_above_to_build_an_equation: Pịa taịlị dị n'elu iji wuo akụkụ...
igbo.ask_the_ai_tutor_anything_about_algebr: Jụọ onye nkuzi AI ihe ọ bụla gbasara algebra!
igbo.solve_algebra_step_by_step: Dozie — algebra nzọ ụkwụ nke ọ bụla
igbo.linear_quadratic_factoring_system_simp: Ahịrị, quadratic, factoring, sistemụ, ime ka ọ dị mfe. AI na-egosi nzọ ụkwụ nke ọ bụla + na-akpọ aha njirimara ejiri (nkesa, ijikọ okwu yiri ya, FOIL). Nsogbu AP / SAT / Algebra 1 nkịtị niile na-ebelata ruo ihe dịka mgbanwe 8.
igbo.multi_difficulty_problem_sets_the_ai_c: Seti nsogbu nwere ọtụtụ ịsịike. AI na-elele azịza gị ma gafee ngwọta zuru ezu ka ị hụ kpọmkwem ebe nzọ ụkwụ gị dịgasị iche. Ọ na-ewu àgwà nke ide mgbakọ na mwepụ, ọ bụghị naanị ịkọ.
igbo.builder_design_your_own_equation: Onye na-ewu — chepụta akụkụ nke gị
igbo.pick_variables_operations_target_value: Họrọ mgbanwe + ọrụ + uru ezubere; sistemụ na-emepụta nsogbu algebra dabara n'imewe gị. Bara uru maka ndị nkuzi na-eme akwụkwọ ọrụ na ụmụ akwụkwọ na-enyocha azụ "ihe na-eme ka nsogbu sie ike."
igbo.scale_visual_algebra_balance: Ihe ọ̀tụ̀tụ̀ — nguzozi algebra a na-ahụ anya
igbo.drag_weights_onto_a_balance_to_model_x: Dọkpụrụ ibu n'ihe ọ̀tụ̀tụ̀ iji setịpụ x + 3 = 7 n'ụzọ a na-ahụ anya. Nghọta bara uru kacha maka algebra mbụ — akụkụ bụ ihe ọ̀tụ̀tụ̀, ọ bụghị oghere efu iji dejupụta. Ihe ị na-eme n'otu akụkụ, mee na nke ọzọ.
igbo.tutor_ask_ai_for_help: Onye nkuzi — rịọ AI maka enyemaka
igbo.ask_the_tutor_about_any_algebra_concep: Jụọ onye nkuzi gbasara echiche algebra ọ bụla ma ọ bụ nzọ ụkwụ rapaara. Onye nkuzi maara ọkwa klas gị, mgbalị na nso nso a, na nsogbu na-arụ ọrụ. Kacha mma maka ajụjụ "gịnị mere ụzọ m ji ghara ịrụ ọrụ?"

lingala.sorry_something_went_wrong_try_again: Bolimbisi, eloko moko ebebi. Meka lisusu!
lingala.your_equation_click_tile_to_remove: Équation na yo (fina tuile mpo na kolongola)
lingala.click_tiles_above_to_build_an_equation: Fina ba-tuile na likolo mpo na kotonga équation...
lingala.interactive_algebra_balance_scale_visu: Bomonisi ya emekeli kilo ya algèbre ya kosangana
lingala.value_to_apply_to_both_sides: Motuya ya kosalela na bangámbo nyonso mibale
lingala.ask_the_ai_tutor_anything_about_algebr: Tuna molakisi AI eloko nyonso na ntina ya algèbre!
lingala.linear_quadratic_factoring_system_simp: Linéaire, quadratique, factorisation, système, koléngola. AI elakisaka litambe nyonso + epesaka nkombo ya propriété oyo esalemi (distributif, kosangisa ba-terme oyo ekokani, FOIL). Mikakatano ya AP / SAT / Algèbre 1 oyo emonanaka mingi nyonso ekitaka tii na ~8 mbongwana.
lingala.multi_difficulty_problem_sets_the_ai_c: Ba-ensemble ya mikakatano ya mpasi ndenge na ndenge. AI etalaka eyano na yo mpe ekatisaka eyano mobimba mpo omona malamu epai matambe na yo ekabwanaki. Etongaka momeseno ya kokoma mathématiques, kaka kokanisa te.
lingala.builder_design_your_own_equation: Motongi — sala équation na yo moko
lingala.pick_variables_operations_target_value: Pona ba-variable + ba-opération + motuya ya tina; système esalaka mokakatano ya algèbre oyo ekokani na design na yo. Ezali na ntina mpo na balakisi oyo basalaka ba-feuille ya mosala mpe bana-kelasi oyo basalaka analyse ya nsima "nini ekómisaka mokakatano mpasi."
lingala.scale_visual_algebra_balance: Emekeli kilo — bokokani ya algèbre na miso
lingala.drag_weights_onto_a_balance_to_model_x: Benda ba-kilo likolo ya emekeli kilo mpo na kosala modèle x + 3 = 7 na miso. Bososoli oyo eleki na ntina mpo na algèbre ya ebandeli — ba-équation ezali ba-emekeli kilo, ezali bisika ya mpamba ya kotondisa te. Oyo osalaka na ngámbo moko, sala na ngámbo mosusu.
lingala.ask_the_tutor_about_any_algebra_concep: Tuna molakisi na ntina ya concept ya algèbre nyonso to litambe oyo ekangami. Molakisi ayebi niveau ya kelasi na yo, komeka ya kala mike, mpe mokakatano oyo ezali kosala. Eleki malamu mpo na mituna "mpo na nini lolenge na ngai esalaki te?"
